curation.synopsis: Class-war thriller aboard the Imperial-Navy cruiser Relentless. First Officer Ward has spent years running the ship as de-facto captain, the crew fat on illicit tithes extracted from civilian traders. When the hardliner Captain Becket is appointed above him, a conspiracy to remove Becket escalates to an assassination attempt that drops the new captain into the Conscript decks — the human fuel of an Imperial cruiser, where the strongest survive a lifetime of labour for the chance to climb back up. Becket has to work his way to the bridge to confront Ward, until a Dark Eldar raider intercept turns the internal coup into a survival fight. Ship-as-society at full scale.
